ddls:
CREATE TABLE "submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submission */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who made the submission */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tournament */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the game session */,
  "submission_time" TEXT /* Time of submission in milliseconds since epoch */,
  "lap_count" INTEGER /* Total number of laps completed */,
  "avg_lap_time" INTEGER /* Average lap time in milliseconds */,
  "best_lap_time" INTEGER /* Best lap time achieved in milliseconds */,
  "total_lap_time" INTEGER /* Total time taken for all laps in milliseconds */,
  "avg_resets" INTEGER /* Average number of resets during the session */,
  "collision_count" INTEGER /* Total number of collisions during the session */,
  "off_track_count" INTEGER /* Total number of times the player went off track */,
  "reset_count" INTEGER /* Total number of resets made during the session */,
  "submission_count" INTEGER /* Total number of submissions made by the user */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player based on performance */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Any penalties incurred during the gameplay */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Player's feedback on the game session */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used for the submission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_submissions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "alias" TEXT /* Alias or username of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A short description or biography of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* The country where the user is based */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* The user's date of birth */,
  "verification_status" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user's account is verified */,
  "security_questions" TEXT /* Security questions for account recovery */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the leaderboard entry */,
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the submission associated with the leaderboard entry */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tournament */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "status_type" TEXT /* Status of the leaderboard submission (e.g., SUCCESS) */,
  "ranking_score" INTEGER /* Score used for ranking the player on the leaderboard */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the leaderboard entry was created */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Any penalties that affect the leaderboard score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_submission_id FOREIGN KEY ("submission_id") REFERENCES submissions ("submission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "game_description" TEXT /* Description of the game */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Developer of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the game */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Average rating of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game associated with the tournament */,
  "prize_pool" TEXT /* Total prize pool for the tournament */,
  "number_of_participants" INTEGER /* Number of participants in the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the session */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user who participated in the session */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the tournament */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session in milliseconds since epoch */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session in milliseconds since epoch */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in milliseconds */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., completed, in progress, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
